visual_language: warm isometric studio corner with bookshelf, easel, plant, and work table as collection entry points
encounter: The visitor arrives in a quiet studio corner. Click the bookshelf, easel, plant, or table to browse that collection in a side panel.
intent: Make browsing feel like exploring a lived-in studio: click an object to open its collection beside the room.

components.description: Isometric room corner with floor and two walls
Clickable furniture hotspot that opens a collection side panel
Sliding side panel listing works from the selected collection
Artwork tile inside the open side panel

layout_engine.scroll: room is fixed; panel scrolls its works
